excluded_task_disposition: Both failed sampled validation on upstream-corrupt out-of-domain rows; preserved ROOTs passed the independently verified exhaustive gate and were published without recomputation.
precondition: Wait externally for g2-array-56106974-r3-resume.done before the first Slurm observation, preventing a concurrent resume of this active turn.
wake_policy: After r3 completion, observe only the ten originally nonfailed tasks; exactly one COMPLETE, new ERROR, or sustained monitor failure may resume. The resumed reconciliation must still validate all twelve final ROOT/receipt pairs, including recovered 1D and 1E.
worker_uuid_policy: All existing worker UUIDs preserved; no replacement.
reset_credit_policy: The remaining personal Codex Full reset is protected and was not consumed.
